causalAutopsy.notes: Increment 2 of the degradation ladder (#3), building on the ladder core shipped in #1243. Adds the never-silent tracking — the half of the operator's principle that says a fallback must never silently persist. The §4 design (bounded, reentrancy-safe, liveness-gated) is the direct response to the 2026-06-21 DegradationReporter event-loop wedge this extends.
